method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Keep pushing arc progression with controlled novelty.

finalOutput.artistThinking: As I delve into 'Mechanical Echoes of Memory', I am drawn to explore the tension between human experiences and the relentless march of technology. I want to layer elements in a way that evokes a sense of both nostalgia and disruption. Creating a strong focal point will allow the viewer to connect emotionally, while the asymmetric support will reflect the unpredictability of memory.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The piece is inspired by the juxtaposition of memories that feel heavy under the weight of mechanical progression. I aim to create a visual dialogue that resonates with the viewer's own experiences of tension and ritual in the context of modern life.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: lyrical, emotionally charged, symbolic. Primary medium language: digital collage with painterly textures. Core motifs: memory, tension, ritual. Arc context: Arc "Soft Catastrophes" step 3/4. Visual anchor directive: strong focal anchor with strong focal anchor. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: human meaning under machine pressure; counterpoint with human meaning under machine pressure. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: strict symmetry. Technique emphasis: structured layering + structured layering; avoid drifting into safe defaults. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Soft Catastrophes step 3/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
